name: Coverage: Weekly Insights Block Focus Time action
description: Logged-in user uses Block Focus Time from Weekly Insights and sees a Focus Block on the calendar or a success message.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait up to 8 seconds for the dashboard
Close the AI chat panel if it covers the Insights sidebar
Scroll to the Weekly Insights or Insights panel
Verify Insights heading and workload chart or suggestion content are visible
Click Block Focus Time or Block focus time button
Wait up to 5 seconds for the action to complete
Verify a success message about focus block, or a Focus Block event appears on the weekly calendar or Today Agenda
